metadata.title: AFSECMO Group | Industrial Services & Logistics
metadata.description: AFSECMO Group delivers engineering, strategy, and delivery services for industrial clients - precision, safety, and operational excellence across mining, energy, construction and logistics.

hero.headline: AFSECMO Group
hero.subtitle: Africa Services & Equipements. Delivering central purchasing, industrial maintenance, and civil engineering (BTP) for demanding environments.

items.label: Strategic headquarters based in Côte d'Ivoire, serving West Africa.
Core industrial sectors: Mining, Oil & Gas, Construction, and Logistics.
End-to-end operations: from central purchasing to global supply chain.

pillars.title: Field-ready service
pillars.description: Solutions designed for real operating conditions: site constraints, urgent requests, equipment availability, logistics and safety standards.

pillars.title: Professional coordination
pillars.description: A single point of contact for sourcing, suppliers, transport, on-site teams and project follow-up.

pillars.title: Long-term relationships
pillars.description: We focus on reliable partnerships with clients, suppliers and contractors to support recurring operational needs.

services.description: AFSECMO brings together technical support, procurement, logistics, maintenance and construction coordination under one professional service platform.

items.title: Mining & Quarry Support
items.summary: Operational support for mining and quarry environments, from field mobilisation and heavy equipment coordination to materials supply and maintenance readiness.

items.title: Oil & Gas Services
items.summary: Industrial services for energy and hydrocarbons projects, supporting field teams with technical procurement, equipment, utilities and maintenance operations.

items.title: Engineering & Construction
items.summary: Structured support for civil works, infrastructure delivery, industrial construction and site preparation requirements.

items.title: Mechanical & Industrial Maintenance
items.summary: Practical mechanical support designed to keep industrial sites operational, productive and safe.

items.title: Electrical, Plumbing & Utilities
items.summary: Technical installation and maintenance support for industrial facilities, camps, warehouses and operational buildings.

items.title: Central Purchasing & Import-Export
items.summary: Professional sourcing and procurement coordination for companies that need reliable access to equipment, materials and suppliers.

items.title: Equipment Rental & Fleet Support
items.summary: Equipment solutions for sites that require fast mobilisation, flexible rental arrangements and reliable field support.

items.title: Logistics & Project Mobilisation
items.summary: End-to-end coordination for moving equipment, materials and teams from suppliers to operational sites.

items.title: Facility & Asset Support
items.summary: Support for operational properties, camps, workshops and industrial facilities that require professional service management.

contact.description: Whether you are looking for logistical solutions, energy partnerships, or industrial construction expertise across West Africa, our team is ready to assist.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: Reach out to our Abidjan headquarters or global offices.

careers.title: Join our team
careers.description: Explore professional opportunities to make a positive difference.
